exploration.title: Deterministic Doc-Structure Extraction & Streaming Candidate Gate
openQuestions: Q1: Scope boundary — what this packet owns vs routes to neighbor goals
Q2: First slice — deterministic provenance wall before the streaming gate
Q3: Package placement — sibling capability package, alignment extension, streaming home
Q4: Citations build-vs-buy — reuse eyecite-js TS port under the citation-guard lane
Q5: Court-PDF backend — defer to file-processing lane; Apache-default, Poppler sidecar-only
Q6: Confidence type — canonical branded UnitInterval + shared-kernel cleanup
Q7: Streaming Complete payload — carry V1 LangExtractResult verbatim vs projection
Q8: Cascade escalation trigger + calibration posture
